title: Pass 5.A.3: ferrotorch-mps softmax pow-2 reduction GPU kernel bug
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-mps audit, GPU_CPU_MISMATCH bucket.

MPS softmax + sum reduction kernels assume power-of-two reduction width and silently produce wrong values for non-pow-2 sizes (per subagent report — exact line cites in #982 rollup).

Acceptance:
- Fix the kernel to handle arbitrary widths (standard tree-reduce + tail loop), OR
- Document the constraint and assert at dispatch boundary
- Add discriminating fixture covering non-pow-2 sizes (e.g., 13, 257, 1023).
